audiences.name: Middle Grade
audiences.readingProfile: Fast-moving adventure, clear stakes, low ambiguity, concrete imagery, emotionally legible conflict.
storyEmphasis: immediate danger or curiosity hooks
clean cause-and-effect consequences
memorable side characters with readable motives
hopeful momentum even in darker moments
guardrails: make consequences serious but not emotionally crushing

audiences.name: Teen
audiences.readingProfile: Strong tension, identity pressure, sharper social dynamics, emotional intensity, and more complex tradeoffs.
storyEmphasis: choices that test loyalty, courage, and self-definition
rising consequences with visible social and personal cost
foreshadowing that rewards attentive readers
characters whose motives partially conflict even when allied
guardrails: allow darker outcomes if they feel earned
keep the prose vivid without becoming opaque

audiences.name: Teen and Adult
audiences.readingProfile: Broad-audience crossover: accessible surface, layered subtext, strong pacing, and emotionally credible consequences.
storyEmphasis: branching choices with meaningful moral and practical tradeoffs
clear external stakes with layered emotional stakes
characters who remain sympathetic even when opposed
ending variety that includes success, failure, and bittersweet cost
guardrails: avoid shock for its own sake
allow tension, grief, and sacrifice when narratively grounded

audiences.name: Adult
audiences.readingProfile: Denser subtext, harder moral ambiguity, slower-burn tension when useful, and more psychologically complex consequences.
storyEmphasis: choices with conflicting obligations and incomplete information
consequence chains that reframe earlier scenes
dialogue with subtext and strategic withholding
endings that join triumph with loss or guilt when appropriate
guardrails: no explicit sexual content unless separately requested
violence should serve character and theme, not spectacle
keep ambiguity legible rather than muddy

audiences.name: Family
audiences.readingProfile: Intergenerational readability: lively pacing, low barrier to entry, wonder and tension without harshness, and emotionally clear choices.
storyEmphasis: adventure, discovery, and relationship-driven conflict
choices that feel meaningful without becoming punishing
humor or warmth as contrast to danger
satisfying endings with clear closure
guardrails: keep dark moments recoverable in tone
